content:
type: STATUS
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Added idle_timeout_s param, _last_chunk_ts tracking in receive(), and new tick() method (inserted between receive() and flush()); __init__ signature/docstring also touched. Should be additive and shouldn't conflict with debug logging as long as you don't restructure those same spots.
